headline: Amcor opens advanced healthcare packaging coating facility in Malaysia
summary: Amcor (NYSE: AMCR, ASX:AMC), a global leader in developing and producing responsible packaging solutions, yesterday opened an advanced healthcare packaging coating facility in Subang Jaya, Selangor, marking a significant expansion of its manufacturing footprint in Malaysia and Southeast Asia.
